title: Identify and repair equipment faults
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and repair equipment faults demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Locate equipment faults

pcs.text: Monitor unit or sub-system performance to identify presence of actual and potential faults1.2 Monitor built in test functions, fault indicators, alarms and error codes and check and review appropriate maintenance records1.3 Detect equipment faults using established fault diagnoses techniques and procedures1.4 Record and/or report faults according to standard procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor unit or sub-system performance to identify presence of actual and potential faults1.2 Monitor built in test functions, fault indicators, alarms and error codes and check and review appropriate maintenance records1.3 Detect equipment faults using established fault diagnoses techniques and procedures1.4 Record and/or report faults according to standard procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor unit or sub-system performance to identify presence of actual and potential faults1.2 Monitor built in test functions, fault indicators, alarms and error codes and check and review appropriate maintenance records1.3 Detect equipment faults using established fault diagnoses techniques and procedures1.4 Record and/or report faults according to standard procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Locate equipment faults

elements.title: Repair and/or replace faulty equipment components

pcs.text: Isolate equipment according to standard procedures in preparation for component repair or replacement2.2 Remove faulty components using appropriate tools and techniques in accordance with standard procedures2.3 Repair and/or replace faulty components in accordance with manufacturer's specifications and standard procedures2.4 Check and test unit, sub-system or system to confirm that maintenance has been completed to specifications2.5 Use tools according to manufacturer's specifications to achieve desired outcomes2.6 Dispose of waste arising from maintenance according to waste management requirements2.7 Record maintenance information in the company reporting system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate equipment according to standard procedures in preparation for component repair or replacement2.2 Remove faulty components using appropriate tools and techniques in accordance with standard procedures2.3 Repair and/or replace faulty components in accordance with manufacturer's specifications and standard procedures2.4 Check and test unit, sub-system or system to confirm that maintenance has been completed to specifications2.5 Use tools according to manufacturer's specifications to achieve desired outcomes2.6 Dispose of waste arising from maintenance according to waste management requirements2.7 Record maintenance information in the company reporting system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate equipment according to standard procedures in preparation for component repair or replacement2.2 Remove faulty components using appropriate tools and techniques in accordance with standard procedures2.3 Repair and/or replace faulty components in accordance with manufacturer's specifications and standard procedures2.4 Check and test unit, sub-system or system to confirm that maintenance has been completed to specifications2.5 Use tools according to manufacturer's specifications to achieve desired outcomes2.6 Dispose of waste arising from maintenance according to waste management requirements2.7 Record maintenance information in the company reporting system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Repair and/or replace faulty equipment components

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
